title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Syntel India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Syntel India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Syntel India Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Syntel India Digital Technologies:
Syntel India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India Digital Technologies!
